hero.body: Strong safety mindset and fast learner. Comfortable working under pressure and following procedures. Looking for an opportunity to learn and grow on the Norwegian shelf — deck, roustabout, rigger or crane-operator positions. Based in Stavern, able to mobilise on short notice.

cv.title: Curriculum Vitae.
cv.body: Read the full résumé straight in the browser — no download required. Use the language switcher at the top to toggle between English and Norwegian.
cv.fallback: If the preview does not load,
cv.openInNewTab: open the PDF in a new tab.
